phase-plan.purpose: Improve schema authoring handoff by showing inheritance/file outputs and editing per-feature default values in one place.
phase-plan.scope: Model Schema Viewer modal only: remove `(base)` child rows, surface `(base)` at namespace header, add editable feature-ref defaults, and render representative TS/C++/C# file lists with inherited defaults.

file.description: Refactor model-tree hierarchy and schema code panel; add default-value editing callback and language file generation.
